name: @slack/prod-server-integration-tests
description: Integration tests running against real Slack APIs

scripts.build: npm run build --prefix ../packages/logger && npm run build --prefix ../packages/types && npm run build --prefix ../packages/web-api && npm run build --prefix ../packages/socket-mode
scripts.test:clean: npm run clean && npm run build && npm install && npm test

author: Slack Technologies, LLC
